  "compiled_intent": {

    "Scope": "East Asia student_builder context; sales_offer compliance evidence; memory_lens integration; multi_runtime_confusion chaos input.",
    "Constraints": [
      "Must resolve missing context and ambiguous acceptance criteria from raw_intent.",
      "Must include explicit validation gates for source policy and claim limits.",
      "Must produce SR8-compilable output with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.",
      "Must handle urgent language without compromising governance."
    ],
    "Success Criteria": [
      "Compliance evidence prompt is fully governed and auditable.",
      "All validation gates are explicitly defined and testable.",
      "Output contract is complete and SR8-compilable."
    ],
    "Output Contract": {
      "artifact_type": "compliance_evidence_prompt",
      "depth_tier": "D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE",
      "runtime_target": "Codex",
      "sections": [
        "source_policy_limits",
        "claim_validation_gates",
        "memory_lens_integration",
        "acceptance_criteria_resolution",
        "governance_audit_trail"
      ],

    }
  }
}
